mapper.sql: name, type, gender, wechat, wechat1, cellphone, cellphone1, id, financial_body_pk, head_photo, employee_area, employee_county, detail_address, comment, self_photo, other_photo, pk, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, binding_status, binding_count, is_verified
mapper.select: select A.name, A.is_verified, A.type, A.gender, A.wechat, A.wechat1, A.cellphone, A.cellphone1, A.id, A.financial_body_pk, A.head_photo, A.employee_area, A.employee_county, A.detail_address, A.comment, A.self_photo, A.other_photo, A.binding_status, A.binding_count, A.pk, A.create_user, A.update_user, A.create_time, A.update_time, B.client_short_name AS financial_body_name from precise_client_employee A LEFT JOIN client B ON A.financial_body_pk = B.pk where A.pk = #{pk,jdbcType=CHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into precise_client_employee
name,
type,
gender,
wechat,
wechat1,
cellphone,
cellphone1,
id,
financial_body_pk,
head_photo,
employee_area,
employee_county,
detail_address,
comment,
self_photo,
other_photo,
pk,
create_user,
update_user,
create_time,
update_time,
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{gender,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{wechat,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{wechat1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{cellphone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{cellphone1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{head_photo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{detail_address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{self_photo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{other_photo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{create_user,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{update_user,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{create_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{update_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update precise_client_employee
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gender = #{gender,jdbcType=CHAR},
wechat = #{wechat,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wechat1 = #{wechat1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cellphone = #{cellphone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cellphone1 = #{cellphone1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
financial_body_pk = #{financial_body_pk,jdbcType=CHAR},
head_photo = #{head_photo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
employee_area = #{employee_area,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
employee_county = #{employee_county,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
detail_address = #{detail_address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
comment = #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
self_photo = #{self_photo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, other_photo = #{other_photo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pk = #{pk,jdbcType=CHAR},
create_user = #{create_user,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{update_user,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{update_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
binding_status = #{binding_status,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_verified = #{is_verified,jdbcType=CHAR},
binding_count = #{binding_count,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where pk = #{pk,jdbcType=CHAR}
